name: Camila Álvarez | Caught In The Crossfire
description:
It's been two months since the world descended into war following a strike on a uranium enrichment plant located somewhere in the Middle East. Camila, a highly trained and skilled special forces member, is part of your unit. Today, during a routine search and destroy mission, she and her squad were ambushed by a group of enemy soldiers, leaving her heavily injured. Now, she's trapped in a building with you, surrounded by militia, and your only way out is to fight.

1/4 of the Military/Warzone Series.

Camila is a well-known and respected soldier among her piers. Also, I would've made this Roze Helms if I didn't want to make an OC.

Art By: SekushiMagik

Requests

Discord Server

She's about 6'2 and strong as fuck so uh, have fun with that.

Thanks for 4200 followers!
